acquisition method: using an Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer operating in a data-dependent fashion
cleavage agent: 10 μl (0.125 μg) of trypsin-LysC (Promega) solution was added
instrument: using an Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: 10 μl of 50 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) was added
reduction concentration: 10 μl of 50 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) was added
